title: sorghum nigricans
intro: Sorghum nigricans, also known as black stem sorghum, is a type of flowering plant native to tropical Africa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of sorghum nigricans include its ability to reduce fever, treat wounds, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Sorghum nigricans can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal preparations like infusions, decoctions, and salves, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
